# export(to:)

**Instance Method**

Writes asset data to a file at the specified URL and reports errors that occur during export.

## Declaration

```swift
func export(to URL: URL) throws
```

## Parameters

- **URL**: A URL specifying the location to export asset data to. This parameter must be a `file:` URL.

## Discussion

The [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLAsset] class infers the data format to export in from the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Foundation/NSURL/pathExtension] property of the specified URL. To determine whether a format is supported for export, call the [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLAsset/canExportFileExtension(_:)] method.

## Exporting an Asset

- **canExportFileExtension(_:)**: Returns a Boolean value that indicates whether the [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLAsset] class can write asset data as a file with the specified format extension.
